since_last: 59% of 85 AI names green; AI Chips & Compute leads +5.77%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a broad bid, 59% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.99% · BTC -3.06% · Gold -2.50% · Nasdaq100 +2.14%. 59% of 85 AI names are green — a broad bid. AI Chips & Compute is doing the heavy lifting at +5.77%.

cards.headline: AI Chips & Compute leads, AI Applications & Data Software lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Chips & Compute at +5.77%; weakest is AI Applications & Data Software at -1.17%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMR is the standout at +12.48%
cards.body: Leaders: SMR +12.48%, MRVL +10.90%, SMCI +8.93%, TLN +8.88%, INTC +8.76%. Laggards: INOD -8.03%, SPCX -7.96%, IBM -5.53%, MDB -3.93%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -7.96% at $176.56
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -7.96% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
